title: Add nie-bridge-matrix crate skeleton and reqwest to workspace
description:
## What
Create bridge-matrix/ crate directory, Cargo.toml, src/main.rs skeleton. Add reqwest to workspace Cargo.toml.

## Algorithm
1. Add reqwest = { version = '0.12', features = ['json'] } to [workspace.dependencies] in Cargo.toml.
2. Add 'bridge-matrix' to workspace members list.
3. Create bridge-matrix/Cargo.toml with name='nie-bridge-matrix', deps: nie-core.workspace, reqwest.workspace, axum.workspace, tokio.workspace, serde.workspace, serde_json.workspace, anyhow.workspace, tracing.workspace, tracing-subscriber.workspace, toml.workspace, clap.
4. Create bridge-matrix/src/main.rs with empty main() and mod declarations: config, matrix, bridge.
5. Create bridge-matrix/src/config.rs, bridge-matrix/src/matrix.rs, bridge-matrix/src/bridge.rs with // TODO stubs.
6. cargo build -p nie-bridge-matrix must compile.

## Defensive programming
- reqwest features: only 'json', no 'native-tls' by default (minimal dep surface)
- No secrets in config struct Debug output (#[derive(Debug)] must redact tokens)
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-bridge-matrix succeeds; new crate visible in workspace
